room.caption: [MtTempleG] I find that Q is the most useless of letters...

instance.creationCode: GID_SET(208566, self.id) image_xscale=2 image_yscale=2 image_angle=90 image_blend=make_color_rgb(120,255,120) noSpin=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=2 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=12
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=2 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=12
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=-1 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=12
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=1 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=12
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=-1 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=12
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=1 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=12
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=-1 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=12
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=2 yDir=-1 shiftChange=48 spriteChange=12
objectUseN=oTrapProjectile spriteUseN=sWolfHeadShot shootDelayN=70 atkPowerN=8 dirN=270 bulletSpeedN=8
